title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Microsoft India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Microsoft India
jsonLd.description:
Microsoft India has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Microsoft India:
Microsoft India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India!
